title: melittis carpatica var. sarmatica
intro: Melittis carpatica var. sarmatica, also known as the Carpathian bee orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melittis carpatica var. sarmatica are attributed to its ability to aid in the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
